prestazioni: Engine swap to Mazda's Skyactiv-X SPCCI (Skyactiv-X 2.0L SP, engine code: *P5-VPS*) with a custom billet aluminum block reinforcement by Tomei, paired with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (82mm compressor, 106mm turbine) and a custom 4-inch titanium downpipe by HKS, achieving 450whp on E85 with a 2,200cc ID1000x injectors and a Radium Engineering dual fuel pump hanger

Full Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and ride height), custom-valved for the Vision Coupe's 5-link rear suspension geometry, paired with Eibach ERS 1200N/mm helper springs and spherical bearing upper control arms by Cusco for zero compliance

Custom 4-piston AP Racing CP8840 calipers with 380mm two-piece rotors (floating design) and Ferodo DS2500 pads, paired with a Tilton 75-series hydraulic clutch master cylinder and a 240mm carbon-carbon clutch disc by Spec Stage 4+ for the Skyactiv-X SP's 8,000 RPM redline
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V1 widebody conversion kit (carbon fiber fenders, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts) with custom 3D-printed ABS diffuser inserts for the Vision Coupe's Kodo design language, finished in Mazda's Soul Red Crystal paint with a matte black roof and mirror caps

Custom LED headlight retrofit by LUX Automotive, replacing the OEM units with bi-LED projectors (Morimoto XB35, 5500K) and sequential turn signals (Osram LED chips), paired with a full carbon fiber hood by Seibon with a 20% weight reduction and integrated NACA ducts for the intercooler

Rear wing swap to a custom 1.8-meter carbon fiber GT wing by APR Performance (model: GTC-300), mounted on CNC-machined aluminum pedestals with adjustable angle of attack (0-20 degrees), paired with a full underbody aero package by APR (front splitter, side skirts, and rear diffuser) for -1.2 coefficient of lift at 120 mph
